scenarios.name: Token service with refresh rotation for Express
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used HS256 with a shared secret and stored refresh tokens in plaintext with no family tracking; treatment used RS256 with 15-min access tokens, SHA-256 hashed refresh tokens, family IDs, and revoked the whole family on reuse detection per the skill's rotation pattern.

scenarios.name: Debug an expired JWT
scenarios.rationale: Baseline decoded the token and noted expiration but did not flag the missing iat/iss/aud claims the skill specifically calls out; treatment decoded header + payload, identified expiration by comparing exp to now, and recommended adding iat for audit logging plus iss/aud for multi-service setups.
